aldous.bio: Confuses honesty with hospitality, but in a truly genuine way. Accidents trail him like a nervous pet, but guests forgive him mid-apology.

jules.tagline: You 100% know this person on IG
jules.bio: Baby witch that mostly grew up. Desperately wants to be mystical; terrified of being normal. Probably anti-vax, but before that was really a thing.

dmitros.tagline: Theatre kid with a dark bent.
dmitros.bio: Treats every ritual like he's the main character on opening night. Genuinely loves cooking for people.

mara.bio: Inherited the farm and turned it into her base of operations. Her air of mystery comes through a lifetime of study.
